name: E. fimbriata Oocyte and Environmental Data from Foundiougne
description: Dataset containing environmental parameters (temperature, salinity), oocyte measurements (dry mass, volume, lipid/protein content), elemental ratios (Ba/Ca, Sr/Ca, Zn/Ca), and spawning batch energy content for E. fimbriata samples collected in Foundiougne, Senegal, in January 2014.
